description_long: This is a robust, green wooden crate with reinforced planks and a weathered finish, designed for heavy-duty storage. The top of the box is open, revealing a large quantity of metallic ammunition rounds neatly packed inside. One side of the crate is stenciled with the word 'AMMUNITION' in bold, white letters, indicating its contents and purpose. The wood grain is visible throughout, with diagonal support beams on two sides for added structural integrity. The crate appears solid and utilitarian, suitable for secure storage and transport of hazardous or valuable items. Its rugged construction and clear labeling suggest it is intended for use in environments such as garages, warehouses, or military storage areas.
description: A green wooden ammunition crate with visible wood grain, reinforced planks, and an open top filled with metallic rounds. Bold 'AMMUNITION' labeling and sturdy construction make it ideal for secure storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'AMMUNITION' label and the open top filled with ammunition.
description_view_1: Side view with diagonal wooden reinforcement and visible ammunition at the top.
description_view_2: Rear view with plain green wood panels and no visible labeling, open top with ammunition.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with diagonal wooden reinforcement and open top showing ammunition.
attribute_lid_type: removable flat lid (not shown, implied by open top)
attribute_placement_location: garage, warehouse floor, military storage, stackable
